# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure region for all resources."
      }
    },
    "serverName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator username."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator password."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "appdb",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL database."
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU name. Basic is cost-effective for initial deployments."
      }
    },
    "skuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU tier."
      }
    },
    "skuCapacity": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 5,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SKU capacity. For Basic, this is typically 5 DTUs."
      }
    },
    "collation": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database collation."
      }
    },
    "maxSizeBytes": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2147483648,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Max size in bytes. Basic commonly supports up to 2 GB."
      }
    },
    "allowAzureServices": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Allow Azure services and resources to access this server (0.0.0.0 firewall rule)."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "firewallRuleName": "AllowAzureServices"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('serverName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "restrictOutboundNetworkAccess": "Disabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "condition": "[parameters('allowAzureServices')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), variables('firewallRuleName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('skuTier')]",
        "capacity": "[parameters('skuCapacity')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "[parameters('collation')]",
        "maxSizeBytes": "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]",
        "readScale": "Disabled",
        "zoneRedundant": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName')), '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "databaseResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    }
  }
}
